raw_response: Given your price sensitivity and budget constraints, the JBL Tune 770NC is a great value option for gaming. It offers solid battery life and multipoint connectivity, allowing you to switch between devices easily. The punchy sound signature enhances gaming audio, though noise cancellation is basic. While it may not be the most premium choice, its affordability and portability make it a practical pick within your budget.
